title: critesion santacrucense
intro: Critesion santacrucense, also known as the sacred chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its calming and soothing effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of apigenin, a flavonoid with anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Critesion santacrucense include reducing anxiety and insomnia, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for topical or internal use, offering a natural remedy for various health concerns.
